items.title: Eigenvalues of AᵀA
items.description: Squared singular values are eigenvalues of AᵀA; right singular vectors are the corresponding eigenvectors.

items.title: PCA implementation
items.description: PCA on centered data is standardly implemented via SVD rather than explicit covariance eigendecomposition.

items.title: Matrix multiplication structure
items.description: SVD analyzes the linear map encoded by A, composed of rotations/reflections and axis-aligned scalings.

items.title: Norms and conditioning
items.description: Largest and smallest singular values determine the L2 operator norm and condition number κ(A) = σ_max / σ_min.
